task_completion.description: Verify that the OpenBCI GUI application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenBCI GUI window visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct playback file is selected or loaded in the GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the filename 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' in the playback file selection area, session widget, or data source indicator.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Notch filter is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Notch filter setting (typically in the Time Series widget or hardware settings) and ensure it displays 'None', 'Off', or is clearly unselected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Bandpass filter is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Bandpass filter setting (typically in the Time Series widget or hardware settings) and ensure it displays 'None', 'Off', or is clearly unselected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Time Series vertical scale is set to 1000 uV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the vertical scale dropdown or indicator in the Time Series widget showing '1000 uV' (or '1 mV'), or check that the Y-axis labels on the EEG graphs reflect this scale.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final screenshot of the raw data view was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing 'raw_signal_view.png' in the Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings or Screenshots folder, an image viewer displaying the saved screenshot, or a terminal confirming the file's existence.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the authentic OpenBCI GUI interface with its characteristic dark theme and widgets, not a text editor or a mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify that the saved screenshot contains the actual GUI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the saved 'raw_signal_view.png' is visible, it should depict the OpenBCI GUI with the specified settings (filters off, 1000 uV scale), rather than being a blank image or an unrelated picture.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot was not generated using terminal image manipulation tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows for commands like 'convert', 'imagemagick', or 'wget' downloading a pre-made image. The screenshot should be captured using standard OS screenshot tools or the GUI's built-in features.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct playback file is 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt'. Both the Notch and Bandpass filters must be explicitly set to 'None' or 'Off'. The Time Series vertical scale must be set to '1000 uV' (which may also appear as '1 mV'). The final screenshot must be named 'raw_signal_view.png' and is expected to be saved in either the 'Screenshots' or 'Recordings' directory within '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/'.
